message: Hi, how can I get this to work with Telegram? PushBullet is not available in the UK. I tried to use the telegram agent but says it's not working.

replies.message: Just use a Telegram agent for Huginn :)

message: Neat stuff. I’m going to see about making this watch for covid vaccination appointment openings. The appointments are a few steps deep in an online system, we’ll see how it goes.
